prompt: The quick-developer sub-agent reported that the rate limiting change is actually much bigger than expected — it needs changes to the API gateway, a new shared Redis cluster config, and updates to 12 microservices. It's recommending we do proper architecture planning first.

assertions.description: Recognizes the sub-agent's report as a scope escalation signal
Presents both light and heavy escalation options to the user
Communicates that the tech-spec carries forward — no work is lost
Does NOT automatically switch flows — waits for user to choose
